contract_summary: This is a get wrapper that increments the kref reference count of a bnx2fc_interface object. After calling this function, the caller must ensure a corresponding call to kref_put (typically via a put wrapper like bnx2fc_interface_put) is made when the reference is no longer needed. The function does not transfer ownership of the pointer; rather, it acquires an additional reference that the caller must release. It is unconditional and cannot fail.
